Title: S5. AHC032 / Mod Stamp

Problem:
Choose up to K = 81 placements of 3 x 3 stamps on a 9 x 9 board to maximize the sum of board entries modulo 998244353.

Grading target:
Score is the sum of final cell values modulo 998244353.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>

Node started: Represent the 9x9 board as a list of 81 integers. Identify all 49 possible 3x3 stamp placements by their top-left corner coordinates (row, col) where 0 <= row <= 6 and 0 <= col <= 6. For each placement, create a list of the 9 indices it covers.

Node started: Given the 81 cell values and the 49 possible 3x3 stamp placements, find a subset of up to 81 placements that maximizes the sum of the resulting cell values modulo 998244353. Note: The problem implies that placing a stamp adds its values to the cells. If the problem implies selecting cells to maximize a sum, clarify if stamps overlap and how overlapping affects the sum. Assuming stamps add their values to the cells, find the combination of up to 81 placements that maximizes the total sum modulo 998244353.
